title: Close remaining MAP report tooling gaps
description: Implement the tooling-domain follow-ups from the MAP full report after TASK-065/080: first-class CHANGES_REQUESTED rework transition, generated/shared output handling in task graph validation, create-time self-review warning verification, and event metrics alias grouping. Claude owns the parallel documentation/status/matrix/portfolio/LangGraph lanes.
acceptance_criteria: Add a first-class task rework transition for CHANGES_REQUESTED tasks
Handle generated/shared output files in task graph validation without false-positive ownership collisions
Verify or improve create-time self-review warnings in map_task.py
Normalize event metric aliases for approved/changes-requested/progress event types
Close INS-0007 lifecycle after stale-emergence tooling and cleanup are implemented
